name: acetyl-11-keto-beta-boswellic acid (akba)
mechanism: Boswellic acids, especially AKBA, act as relatively selective 5-lipoxygenase inhibitors and reduce leukotriene synthesis in inflammatory pathways.
summary: Boswellic acids, especially AKBA, act as relatively selective 5-lipoxygenase inhibitors and reduce leukotriene synthesis in inflammatory pathways.
